name: Dynavap Dynacoil
summary: Crafted with precision, the DynaCoil is a medical-grade titanium concentrate adapter that seamlessly connects to all DynaVap tips.
description: Crafted with precision, the DynaCoil is a medical-grade titanium concentrate adapter that seamlessly connects to all DynaVap tips. Expertly designed to work with a variety of full melt concentrates, its intricate construction securely holds the extracts in place while allowing for efficient extraction. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
